critiques.finding: RepeatingGroup ai_RNbBHXbL does not apply bubbleStyle('RepeatingGroup_list_') though RepeatingGroup_list_ is in decompose ui_refs[] and styles.json defines border/background none.
critiques.alternative: Add bubbleStyle('RepeatingGroup_list_') to the RG container className or document intentional Tailwind substitution in coverage.

critiques.finding: Delete trigger sets deleteTarget state but DeleteConversationPopup is not mounted — user sees no modal until CHAT-04 lands.
